prompt.content:
From the P&L of the Happy Hospital for 2026, present in the financial model by making all the corrections listed in the instructions below.

1.	State the new per-session price in Michigan in 2026 for ketamine TRD treatment, which is the highest possible integer that is lower than the mean session price in the previous year in that state. Use the Ketamine session sample to calculate this new price. 
2.	State the updated:
- COGS for 2026 with the sum of sub-components. Report this figure with a negative sign.
- Gross Profit (in $) for 2026.
- Gross Margin (in %) for 2026.
- SG&A for 2026 as the sum of all its subcomponents. Assume that the percentage of revenue represented by each SG&A component remains unchanged from the original P&L. Report the updated SG&A figure with a negative sign.
- EBIT for 2026.
- EBIT margin in % for 2026.
- EBITDA for 2026, assuming "Training amortization" represents all relevant Depreciation & Amortization.
- EBITDA margin in % for 2026. 

Report response as a message in console, report USD figures and percentages rounded to the nearest integer.

messages.content: State that the new per session price in Michigan in 2026 for ketamine TRD treatment is $400 (acceptable range $396 to $404).
